description:
Legal record (#60) in a court register/pinqas from a Rabbanite beit din in Cairo (on f. 16r of BL OR 6356). In Hebrew. Location: Cairo. Dated 25 Tammuz 5443 AM, which is 1683 CE. 

(Document #60) Partnership dissolution and release agreement between Yosef Temīm and Nissim Griyani aka Ḥefeṣ. MCD.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בהספרייה הבריטית.
